en.name_en: Wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai
en.description_en: Wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture, a type of tangible cultural property. It holds town-designated status in Kawajima Town, designated in 1989. It is located at Saiken-ji, Fukizuka, Kawajima Town, Saitama Prefecture.

en.name_en: Wooden seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai
en.description_en: Wooden seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai is a sculpture, a type of tangible cultural property. It holds town-designated status in Kawajima Town, designated in 1961. It is located at Yakushi-dō, Shimo-Yatsubayashi, Kawajima Town, Saitama Prefecture.

en.name_en: Wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai
en.description_en: Wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture, a type of tangible cultural property. It holds town-designated status in Kawajima Town, designated in 1989. It is located at Kongō-ji, Nakayama, Kawajima Town, Saitama Prefecture.

Wooden seated statue of Shō-Kannon is a sculpture, a type of tangible cultural property. It holds town-designated status in Kawajima Town, designated in 1989. It is located at Shōsen-ji, Nakayama, Kawajima Town, Saitama Prefecture.

Shimoguruwa festival hayashi music is an intangible folk cultural property. It holds town-designated status in Kawajima Town, designated in 2017. It is located at Igusa district, Kawajima Town, Saitama Prefecture.
